# Vantage Hollywood building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: vantage-hollywood-1710-n-fuller-ave
- Address: 1710 N Fuller Ave, Los Angeles, CA 90046
- Primary URL: https://www.equityapartments.com/los-angeles/west-hollywood/vantage-apartments
- Management company: Equity Residential
- Recommended status: tour_candidate
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 4 (medium, evidence count 1)
- Management: 4 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Amenity: 4 (medium, evidence count 3)
- Community stability: 4 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Location fit: 4
- Pricing transparency: 4

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: unknown
- Location noise risk: medium
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] Official materials support controlled entry, Amazon Hub lockers, rooftop lounge, pool, 24-hour fitness, and EV charging. Source: Equity Apartments official site (https://www.equityapartments.com/los-angeles/west-hollywood/vantage-apartments). Note: Current official materials support controlled entry, Amazon Hub lockers, rooftop lounge, pool, 24-hour fitness, and EV charging.
- [review] Birdeye shows a large body of public resident reviews for the property. Source: Birdeye (https://reviews.birdeye.com/vantage-hollywood-apartments-156799630348894). Note: Birdeye showed 235 customer reviews in the public profile.
- [review] Zumper currently lists active pricing and a verified profile, which helps on rent visibility. Source: Zumper (https://www.zumper.com/apartment-buildings/p16283/vantage-hollywood-hollywood-hills-west-los-angeles-ca). Note: Zumper showed verified listing status and live pricing for studios through 2BRs.

## Open questions
- Verify in-unit washer and dryer at the specific unit level because the official site describes it as select-home.

## Notes
Tour candidate. Vantage combines strong management depth with a quieter-feeling side-street address than many Hollywood options, but the select-home washer/dryer issue has to be unit-matched before anything moves forward.
